options.description: If generating an HTML report, open in the default browser
Discover all files in the working directory matching the pattern and run tests on them. Alias for '--project all'
Filters for opencover, i.e. files to include/exclude from report
Merge multiple runs into the same results file
Any other options you'd like passed into OpenCover
Project to test. If you specify 'all' then it will find all projects in the folder and subfolders matching '*Tests.csproj'
The format to use for the VSTest test results
Log more verbose details of whats happening
Sets the working directory of the application
